hooks.command: br=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name '@{u}' >/dev/null 2>&1; then git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" pull --ff-only 2>&1 | tail -2 | sed 's/^/[Auto-Pull] /'; elif [ -n "$br" ] && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin "$br" >/dev/null 2>&1; then git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --set-upstream-to="origin/$br" "$br" >/dev/null 2>&1; git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" pull --ff-only 2>&1 | tail -2 | sed 's/^/[Auto-Pull] /'; else echo "[Auto-Pull] Branch '$br' hat kein Tracking und kein Remote-Gegenstueck - Pull uebersprungen"; fi
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && if [ -n "$(git log @{u}..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git push 2>&1 | tail -1 | sed 's/^/[Auto-Push] /'; fi
